Operation 'createorupdatecase' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on input requirements (what CaseRequest contains), response details (what CaseResponse returns and HTTP status codes), and side effects (creation vs. update behavior). data.current_description: Creates a new case or updates an existing one based on CaseExternalId uniqueness.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new case or update existing case
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new funeral case or updates an existing case based on CaseExternalId uniqueness. Accepts a CaseRequest object containing case details, events, locations, and family information. Returns a CaseResponse with HTTP 201 for new cases or HTTP 200 for updates. If a case with the provided CaseExternalId already exists for the account, it will be updated; otherwise, a new case is created.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on input requirements (what CaseRequest contains), response details (what CaseResponse returns and HTTP status codes), and side effects (creation vs. update behavior). Added specifics about request/response schemas, HTTP status codes, and the conditional logic for create vs. update to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns list of all previously submitted cases for an account.

data.current_description: Returns complete details for a single case.

Use this operation when you need full case information for a specific case.
